step_rationale: N-methyl-D-aspartate receptor; ischemic cardiomyocyte death via excitotoxicity.
mechanism: NMDAR activation mediates excitotoxic calcium overload and mitochondrial damage in ischemic myocardial injury.

references.title: A Metabolomics-Based Study on NMDAR-Mediated Mitochondrial Damage through Calcium Overload and ROS Accumulation in Myocardial Infarction.
